Restoration.description: Your car has seen better days. This is a great option for cars that have been neglected or for restoration projects. We offer a wide range of spot cleaning services, including pet stain removal, smoke damage cleaning, and odor removal. We also offer a more concentrated two-step process for major spills or bodily fluids.
Restoration.additional_info: Variation: Price and duration vary on size and area. Additional cost for bodily fluids applies for safety.

Glow Up.description: Our Exterior cleaning option. We use an all-natural castor soap to clean the car body and provide deep wheel cleaning. This is followed by wax and buff. A streak-free interior and exterior window cleaning is included. This is a great option for a quick refresh or regular maintenance.

Royal Detailing.description: This option adds full fabric shampooing, water extraction, seat belt steaming, and a full car air drying. This is a great option for a deep clean or for cars that have been exposed to pets, smoke, or other strong odors.

Nooks and Crannies.description: An extreme deep cleaning. We remove seats and target buildup below trim pieces and panels. We also offer the option for vacuuming below the carpeting upon request. This is a great option for cars that need a deep clean or for presummer cleaning.

Noble Detailing.description: A quick interior detailing. This includes cleaning all high-contact materials and vacuuming. Screens, mirrors, and windows are guaranteed to be left clean and streak-free. Any weather-proof matting will be removed and cleaned. This is a great option for a quick refresh or regular maintenance.

Noble Glow Up.description: Our most popular package. This includes the Glow Up and Noble Detailing services. A great option for regular maintenance or a quick refresh.

New Found Kingdom.description: This includes all of our base services. A great option for cars that need a deep clean or for presummer cleaning.

Royal Glow Up.description: This includes the Glow Up, Noble Detailing, and Royal Detailing services. A great option for a deep clean or for cars that have been exposed to pets, smoke, or other strong odors.
